name: The Juroku Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Juroku Bank, Ltd. engages in banking and leasing businesses in Japan. The company's Banking Business segment is involved in deposit-taking and lending, securities trading, securities investment, domestic and foreign exchange, managing bonds, derivatives, and other related activities. Its Lease Business segment offers leasing services. The company also provides credit cards, computer services, and credit guarantees. It operates 162 branch offices primarily in the prefectures of Gifu and Aichi, as well as representative offices in Shanghai, Singapore, Bangkok, and Hanoi. The Juroku Bank, Ltd. was founded in 1877 and is headquartered in Gifu, Japan.
